description: The curated default study track ('core path') for the lessons deck. The deck opens in core mode: navigation walks only these units; the full deck remains one keypress away (c). Chosen 2026-06-11 under the LA's 'core path only' scope decision, after the 390-slide scale surfaced.
criteria: A lesson earns core placement by (1) AIGP density — it exemplifies a named Body of Knowledge domain or framework idea the exam actually tests (TEVV, fail-safe posture, human oversight, decision records, premise verification); (2) arc coverage — the founding failure, the verification turn, the security posture, the governance maturity beats are all represented; (3) story strength — the failure is concrete enough to anchor the principle in memory. Domain II (laws as applied) is structurally absent from lived lessons and is named as a gap on the AIGP-frame slide, not papered over.
